focus: dependencies, Node version, and the harness-zoo templates

claims.claim: The project has zero npm dependencies (package.json's dependencies block is empty).
The project targets Node.js 18 or newer (engines.node is ">=18").
GoalLint runs as eleven agents (1 Parse + 7 Critique + 1 Rewrite + 1 Verify + 1 Report).
The repo ships a runner/test/ suite that you run with `npm test`.
The runner depends on the `express` package to serve the live viewer.
claims.evidence_needed: package.json dependencies / any import of express in the runner
